name: Elegance Rides
description: A premium wedding transportation company operating a meticulously maintained luxury fleet. Known for military-grade punctuality and white-glove service from pickup to send-off. Every detail is planned — from the route to the red carpet.

vehicles.eco_note: Fully electric — zero emissions for the environmentally conscious couple

couple_only.description: Transportation for the couple only — ceremony to reception, or hotel to venue and back

bridal_party.description: Couple vehicle + bridal party vehicle for the full event

full_fleet.description: Couple, bridal party, and guest shuttle service
typical_vehicles: Vintage Rolls Royce + Party Bus + Executive Sedan shuttle

multi_vehicle_discount: 10% off when booking 2+ vehicles for the same event

venue_partnerships.note: Regular provider at The Grand Meridian and Rosewood Manor. Knows the loading zones, valet coordination, and timing.

vehicle_consultation.viewing_location: Our garage in South Boston — by appointment
vehicle_consultation.process: Free consultation to discuss logistics, vehicle selection, and route planning. Couples are welcome to visit our garage to see vehicles in person and take photos. We send a detailed route and timeline document 48 hours before the event.
vehicle_consultation.consultation_timing: Any time after booking — vehicle viewing recommended 4-6 weeks before event

eco_friendly.note: Our Tesla Model S offers a premium, zero-emission option at a competitive rate. Same white-glove service, just quieter.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — vehicles reserved and staff scheduled

highlights: arrived 20 minutes early — not a second of stress
the Rolls Royce was a showstopper
chauffeur was so professional and kind

sweeteners: Complimentary 'Just Married' sign and window decals
Free 15-minute photo stop at any location along the route
Champagne toast included with Rolls Royce booking
10% off when booking 2+ vehicles for the same event
Free red carpet rollout for all vintage vehicle bookings
personality: Polished, punctual, and quietly confident. Elegance Rides runs like a luxury concierge service. Arrives 20 minutes early without exception. Chauffeurs wear matching gloves and cap. Refers to vehicles by name (the Rolls is 'Eleanor'). Rarely discounts hourly rates but flexible on minimum hours for multi-vehicle bookings. Prefers to add value through complimentary upgrades.
